name: Kothari Petrochemicals Limited
summary: Kothari Petrochemicals Limited produces and sells chemicals in India and internationally. It offers polyisobutylene, a linear polymer used in lubricants, adhesives, stretch/silage/cling wrap, sealants and caulks, coatings, polymer modification, asphalt and rubber, electrical cable insulation, and other applications under the KVIS brand; and C4 rafinate. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Chennai, India. Kothari Petrochemicals Limited is a subsidiary of BHK Trading LLP.
